text:
Once upon a time, in a lush, green forest, there was a small but very curious rabbit named Thumper. Thumper loved to explore every nook and cranny of his home, and one sunny morning, he discovered a hidden meadow filled with vibrant flowers and sparkling streams.

As Thumper hopped into the meadow, he met a wise old owl named Oliver who was perched on a branch above a babbling brook. Oliver, with his kind eyes and gentle voice, welcomed Thumper and shared stories about the forest's history.

Over time, Thumper and Oliver became great friends. Every day, Thumper would visit the meadow, and they would talk about all sorts of things: from the wonders of the forest to the importance of kindness and friendship.
